title: Input schema of the arXiv Paper-to-JSON Scraper

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: arXiv URLs to scrape (e.g., recent papers, categories).

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Papers to Scrape
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of papers to extract.

categories.title: Paper Categories
categories.description: arXiv categories to scrape (cs.AI, cs.LG, cs.NLP, etc.)

extractEquations.title: Extract Equations
extractEquations.description: Whether to extract LaTeX equations from papers.

extractTables.title: Extract Tables
extractTables.description: Whether to extract tables and their data.

extractMetadata.title: Extract Metadata
extractMetadata.description: Extract authors, dates, arxiv IDs, categories.

downloadPDF.title: Download PDF Text
downloadPDF.description: Extract full text from PDF (slower but more complete).

structuredOutput.title: Structured JSON Output
structuredOutput.description: Format output as structured JSON for ML/NLP pipelines.
